title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at IDP Education India - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at IDP Education India - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Join the IDP Education India family as a Curriculum Developer in Tiruchirappalli. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About IDP Education India:
IDP Education India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Educational Technology
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in Special Education
• Proficiency in Data Analysis
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Professional development and training programs
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Tiruchirappalli, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with IDP Education India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
